name: creative-hubb-album-toolkit-pro
description: Professional Album Production Software by Creative Hubb

scripts.typecheck: node --check app.js && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/license.js && node --check src/photoshop.js && node --check src/theme.js && node --check src/stubs/uxp.js && node --check src/stubs/photoshop.js && node --check src/jsx/templates.js && node --check src/proof_renderer.js && node --check src/telemetry.js && node --check src/curation.js && node --check src/generative_templates.js && node --check src/plugins.js && node --check src/library.js && node --check src/builtin_plugins/focal-point/index.js && node --check src/tools_bar.js && node --check src/sharp_config.js && node --check src/thumbnailer.js && node --check src/renamer.js && node --check src/renderer_pure.js && node --check src/renamer_naming.js && node --check src/renamer_renderer.js && node --check src/editor_renderer.js && node --check src/editor_preload.js && node --check src/ui_tilt.js && node --check src/ui_layout.js && node --check src/ui_folders.js
scripts.prebuild:mac: npm run typecheck && npm run lint

extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Album Toolkit sends commands to Adobe Photoshop to swap images, export JPEGs, run actions, and keep the floating Tools Bar docked to Photoshop's window.
